05 March 2023

What is Noise?

Noise is a function that takes parameters and returns values according to the rules of an algorithm. Two-dimensional noise is particularly convenient because it can be visualized as a texture.

The first random output has no recognizable structure.

Perlin’s Noise Algorithm

Perlin noise is a coherent-noise algorithm. Every point lies inside a square whose corners have integer coordinates.

We have our point as P=(x,y)P = (x, y)P=(x,y).

The implementation computes gradient dot products and interpolates between them. A smoothing curve produces the final coherent result.
